# Google Gemini Full Course (3 Hours): Build and Automate AI Workflows

**Why you should care**
You can use this update right now to improve your AI workflow this week.
Most teams delay action, then lose speed and learning momentum.

**What changed**
This update focuses on guides & playbooks and practical execution.
The source was published or reviewed on Mar 4, 2026.
You should treat this as a working playbook, not background noise.
before_after_samples.title_after: Google Gemini Full Course (3 Hours): Build and Automate AI Workflows
before_after_samples.sample_after:
# Google Gemini Full Course (3 Hours): Build and Automate AI Workflows

**The quick take**
Google pushed meaningful Gemini upgrades you can use without changing your whole stack.

**What changed and why it matters**
- Gemini added features that remove extra app switching for search, drafting, and analysis.
- Free-tier access improved, so you can test serious workflows before paying.
- The big win is speed: fewer handoffs between tools means fewer dropped details.

**How to use this this week**
1. Run your next brief in Gemini and your current tool side by side.

before_after_samples.title_after: Anthropic Accuses Chinese AI Labs Of Mining Claude As Us Debates AI Chip Exports
before_after_samples.sample_after:
# Anthropic Accuses Chinese AI Labs Of Mining Claude As Us Debates AI Chip Exports

**The quick take**
Model competition is now a supply-chain and policy game, so your model strategy needs a backup plan.

**What changed and why it matters**
- Public allegations around model distillation raise trust and compliance questions.
- Export controls can change model availability, pricing, and latency by region.
- If you rely on one provider, policy shifts can block delivery with little warning.

**How to use this this week**
1. List your top 3 model dependencies and where they can fail.
